description.en_US: motionEye is a web-based frontend for motion. Check out the wiki for more details. Changelog is available on the releases page. https://github.com/motioneye-project/motioneye
description.zh_CN: motionEye是motion的基于Web的前端。查看Wiki以获取更多详细信息。更改日志请参阅发布页面。https://github.com/motioneye-project/motioneye

tagline.en_US: A web frontend for the motion daemon.
